name: Payday Loans Cash
description_short: Miami's Payday Loans Cash location at 3390 NW 72nd Ave offers fast cash advances and title loans for Florida residents needing emergency funds.
description_long:
Payday Loans Cash is located at 3390 NW 72nd Ave in Miami, FL, serving residents throughout the greater Miami area. This standalone storefront maintains extended hours of operation from 3 AM to 2 AM, Monday through Sunday, making it accessible for borrowers needing emergency funds outside traditional banking hours.

The Miami location provides payday loans and title loans to qualifying applicants. To apply, bring a valid government-issued ID and proof of current income to the store. The team can typically process applications and fund approved loans the same day.

For Miami residents facing unexpected expenses, this location offers a quick alternative to conventional bank loans. The straightforward application process means most borrowers can walk in and have funds in hand within hours. Payday Loans Cash serves the greater Miami area with transparent fees and flexible terms.
pros: Network of 100+ partner lenders increases likelihood of loan approval for borrowers with various credit profiles
Fast online application process completed in minutes with no requirement to visit multiple websites
256-bit SSL encryption protects submitted personal and financial data during transmission
Same-day or next-business-day direct bank deposit funding available once lender approves
Single application form forwarded to multiple lenders eliminates repetitive paperwork
Serves Phoenix/Arizona market with localized lending options
No upfront fees charged by the marketplace itself for application submission
cons: Website contains excessive keyword stuffing, grammatical errors, and incoherent passages suggesting poor content quality or automated generation
Company does not disclose its own rates, fees, or lending terms—borrowers only see lender terms after approval and redirect
About Us page non-functional (404 error), limiting transparency about company background, licensing, and operations
As a lead generator rather than direct lender, borrowers are redirected to partner lender sites, reducing control over final loan terms
No information provided about lender qualification standards, default rates, or complaint history
best_for: Arizona residents needing emergency cash within 1-2 business days for unexpected expenses
Borrowers with fair or poor credit seeking access to multiple lenders without multiple applications
Consumers needing small loans ($100-$1,000+) for vehicle repairs, medical bills, or urgent bills
diagnosis: Payday Loans Cash is best for Arizona residents needing rapid access to emergency cash who want to avoid multiple applications across different lenders. Primary caveat: this is a lending marketplace/lead generator, not a direct lender, so actual loan terms, rates, and fees are set by partner lenders and unknown until after application—borrowers should be prepared to comparison shop among offered lenders and review all terms before accepting.
services: Online payday loan marketplace and lead generation platform
Personal loan application processing and lender matching
Fast cash advance connections for emergency expenses
Multi-lender network access through single application
Loan terms review and acceptance facilitation
meta_description: Payday Loans Cash at 3390 NW 72nd Ave, Miami, FL. Fast cash advances, open 24/7, same-day funding available.
seo_title: Payday Loans Cash in Miami, FL | CreditDoc
